reviews.review_description: Omg like… i am a gtag Lover but i don’t have a pc for mods so now I can play with mods thanks I rated this a five star game but one thing is that every time I change from forest to city my arms glitch and just go invisible 🫥 so if y’all could fix that it would be great 😊 Love the game.

reviews.review_title: Uninstall it or don’t get it
reviews.review_description: I used to love the game until these people came in andI’m uninstalling the game because every freaking time I join a lobby there always has to be someone that’s toxic and someone modding and theirs people that are false reporting all the time and someone is always false reporting me and false reporting me in the discord and theirs barely anyone chill everyone is just toxic and I hate I recommend you don’t get the game or uninstall it😭😭😭😭😭😭😭I love the updates though it’s just the people the stupid people that play this but the amount of shiny rocks you have is 😭😭😭😭😭😭😭
The best game ever just put the normal mods in Barack mod menu
But can’t fix this game a little because city is kinda laggy
I stay cozy in trash runners
Is it hacked or no I just got it and downloaded it on my phone to my ocoulas developer please respond if it hacked or not
It has the bark mod And other good mod menus plus o play this game every day it's like my favorite game on my headset soundboard mod menu is very good and that's it

So I was just playing trash runners and then I go to city for the first time in boom I see the Gorilla Tag plushy my favorite girls are cosmetic in my dream cosmetic so I decided to go buy it and then I wanna go to buy it and then it says error in purchasing, so yeah can you make it Buyable please

First of all, in ii’s stupid mod menu the platforms are really bugged, and also become caseoh and grab rig are the only ones that really work. Also, I don’t know if it’s intentional or not but I cant scroll to any pages on the menu. Second, the bark mod menu has a bug where if you press previous page you get the rockets. Third, the mono sandbox is just all together terrible. I thought it would be good but I was horribly wrong. You have to press the right trigger a thousand times before the object spawns, and when it does your hand gets stuck to it. Also some of the models don’t show up and the objects are black shapes. And, the c4 just noclips through Through floor and the revolver just fires randomly. The third problem with the game is you can’t buy the flamethrower and when it’s in your basket you can’t pick it up and it’s always on. Same with gorilla plush. Although, the default menu is quite good. Please, asteroid fix this game

Edit: So, the new update came out and I expected the game to improve, that maybe asteroid would have fixed at least some of the bugs, but no. 0 bugs were fixed, and also another one has appeared where I can’t scroll to page 2 of the mod menus I can use. I’m also annoyed to see that the banana OS STILL hasn’t been finished. I know game development can take a lot, especially vr game development (Trust me, I’ve tried many many times). But still, couldn’t you have patched AT LEAST ONE BUG??? All the problems I mentioned last time are still in the game. Also anther bug is whenever use a skin texture the actual body just flickers between black and whatever custom texture I chose. Trust me, it’s called trash runners for a reason. Please, please PLEASE asteroid, FIX THIS GARBAGE

developer_response.body:
the skin thing isnt fixable.

and we are trying our best to fix it.
